caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a green t-shirt sits before a professional black microphone in a room filled with framed photos and clothing. His t-shirt features the white text "I CON NEVER DO SHIT" with the word "SHIT" in a stylized, dripping font. He wears black over-ear headphones and is speaking, his facial expression shifting from a focused look to a slight smile and a nod. In the background, a white mannequin torso stands next to racks of colorful clothing. A logo with the text "BOSSY FLY" is visible in the lower corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, but his head movements and facial expressions change as he speaks into the microphone.
